/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/AscendOS.dir/AscendOS_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AscendOS.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AscendOS.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o -o AscendOS -F/usr/local/opt/qt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/opt/qt/lib /usr/local/opt/qt/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /usr/local/opt/qt/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AGL -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /usr/local/opt/qt/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
